operation.name: addOffsetPtr_at_dmamove_job_exec
preconditions:
(set-logic QF_AUFBV )
(declare-fun pending_count () (Array (_ BitVec 32) (_ BitVec 8) ) )
(assert (let ( (?B1 (concat  (select  pending_count (_ bv3 32) ) (concat  (select  pending_count (_ bv2 32) ) (concat  (select  pending_count (_ bv1 32) ) (select  pending_count (_ bv0 32) ) ) ) ) ) ) (and  (bvult  (_ bv0 32) ?B1 ) (=  false (bvule  ?B1 (_ bv64 32) ) ) ) ) )
(check-sat)
(exit)
(set-logic QF_AUFBV )
(declare-fun pending_count () (Array (_ BitVec 32) (_ BitVec 8) ) )
(assert (let ( (?B1 (concat  (select  pending_count (_ bv3 32) ) (concat  (select  pending_count (_ bv2 32) ) (concat  (select  pending_count (_ bv1 32) ) (select  pending_count (_ bv0 32) ) ) ) ) ) ) (and  (bvult  (_ bv0 32) ?B1 ) (bvule  ?B1 (_ bv64 32) ) ) ) )
(check-sat)
(exit)

oracle_spec.assertion: dmamove_job.exec_done is interpreted consistently across all live consumers
assumptions: resource stays live while read under >= 2 incompatible models

metadata.wma: Logic-Induced Signal Divergence to Adversary-Controlled Memory Access
